from textual.widgets import DataTable, Input, Label, Static

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

    """Connection profile picker.

input.old_string:
async def test_proclist_refresh_key_calls_list_processes() -> None:
    """Pressing R triggers a second call to list_processes."""
    fake = FakeConnector([make_process(1)])
    app = _ProclistApp(fake)
    async with app.run_test() as pilot:
        screen: ProclistScreen = pilot.app.screen  # type: ignore[assignment]
        await screen._do_refresh()

        calls_before = fake.call_count

        # Patch run_worker so we can await the coroutine directly
        original_run_worker = screen.run_worker

        async def _direct(coro: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> None:  # noqa: ANN401
            await coro

        with patch.object(screen, "run_worker", side_effect=_direct):
            await pilot.press("r")
            await pilot.pause(0.1)

        assert fake.call_count > calls_before

async def test_proclist_refresh_key_calls_list_processes() -> None:
    """Pressing R triggers a second call to list_processes."""
    fake = FakeConnector([make_process(1)])
    app = _ProclistApp(fake)
    async with app.run_test() as pilot:
        screen: ProclistScreen = pilot.app.screen  # type: ignore[assignment]
        await screen._do_refresh()

        calls_before = fake.call_count

        await pilot.press("r")
        # Allow the worker spawned by action_refresh to run to completion
        await pilot.pause(0.3)

        assert fake.call_count > calls_before

input.name: textual-proclist-screen-pattern
input.description: Use whenever building a Textual DataTable screen that polls async data from a connector (process list, lock list, query list). Covers run_worker refresh pattern, filter input show/hide, error-retain-stale-data pattern, footer detail panel, and test host app structure.
input.body:
# Textual Async DataTable Screen Pattern (trovedb)

## Screen Structure

```python
class ProclistScreen(Screen[None]):
    BINDINGS = [
        Binding("r", "refresh", ..., show=False),
        Binding("f5", "refresh", ..., show=False),
        Binding("slash", "open_filter", ..., show=False),
        Binding("escape", "go_back", ..., show=False),
        Binding("q", "quit", ..., show=False),
    ]

    def compose(self) -> ComposeResult:
        yield Static("", id="status")           # dock: top
        yield Static("", id="error")            # dock: top, hidden
        yield DataTable(id="table", cursor_type="row")
        yield Static("No data yet.", id="empty")  # shown when list is empty
        yield Static("(idle)", id="footer")     # query detail panel
        yield Input(..., id...[truncated 5616 chars]
